title: SnowPro Specialty: Gen AI Practice Test
description: Free interactive practice tests for the Snowflake SnowPro Specialty: Generative AI certification with Cortex AI, LLMs, and RAG questions.
longDescription: The SnowPro Specialty: Gen AI certification validates your expertise in building generative AI applications on Snowflake. Practice with questions on Cortex AI functions, Cortex Search, Cortex Analyst, fine-tuning, RAG pipelines, and LLM evaluation.
prerequisites: Familiarity with LLMs, embeddings, and RAG patterns
